search_query: when do hormones settle after having a baby
combined_text: How long does it take for hormones to go back to normal after giving birth? Lee Ballentine, Parent, Lamaze coach, veteran of past sleep deprivation, never been pregnant. Answered Dec 26, 2016 · Author has 8.4k answers and 20m answer views Basically, never. Life is a one-way ticket down the road to successive destinations.
